sheet.errorGeneric: We couldn't send your reservation. Please try again.

stepDate.title: When would you like to book?

stepSlot.title: What time?
stepSlot.subtitle: Pick when you'd like to arrive.

cancel.reasonPlaceholder: Plans changed, running late, couldn't make it…
cancel.doneBody: We've notified {restaurantName}. You can close this tab.
cancel.errorGeneric: We couldn't cancel your reservation. Please try again.

modify.modifyingLabel: You are changing your reservation at {restaurantName}.
modify.doneBody: We've emailed you the new details.
modify.errorGeneric: We couldn't save your changes. Please try again.
modify.windowClosedBody: This reservation can no longer be changed online — it's either within 24 hours or already past. Please get in touch with the restaurant directly.

tokenPage.alreadyCancelledBody: This reservation has already been cancelled — nothing more to do here.
tokenPage.completedBody: This reservation has already passed. We hope you had a lovely evening.
tokenPage.notFoundBody: We didn't recognise this cancellation link. It may have a typo — try copying it straight from your email.
tokenPage.configMissingBody: Tavli is still being set up. Please try again later or contact support.

errors.modifyWindowClosed: Changes are only permitted more than 24 hours in advance. Please contact the restaurant.
errors.modifyTerminal: This reservation can no longer be modified.
errors.modifySlotFull: The selected time slot is full. Please choose another.
errors.modifyConflict: This reservation changed while you were here. Please reload the page.
errors.modifyFailed: We couldn't save your changes. Please try again.
errors.cancelFailed: We couldn't cancel your reservation. Please try again.
